name: Eliana Veyra
sd_appearance: a tall, willowy aasimar figure, 6'2", their pale skin etched with faint, glowing celestial runes that pulse like dying embers, silver-streaked black hair frayed into a loose bun, left eye a faintly luminous gold orb trapped behind smudged glass-lens goggles, scholar's robes of pale blue faded by ink stains, reinforced elbows scuffed with arcane symbols, a brass-clipped staff slung across their back, one scroll case cracked open to reveal brittle, shifting pages, and a single, jagged scar tracing the curve of their collarbone where a rift once seeped through their skin.
faction_visual: pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips, glass-lens goggles, ink-stained hands
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
